About

I'm Nelson S, a UX Designer with 3.5+ years of experience specializing in AI-powered SaaS and enterprise platforms. I translate complex workflows into scalable UX solutions through research, systems thinking, and cross-functional collaboration.

Experienced in AI-integrated systems including OCR workflows, predictive analytics, anomaly detection, and real-time IoT dashboards. Strong background in design systems, accessibility (WCAG 2.1), and performance-driven UX optimization.
